subcodes.first_line: O leaf of certitude! Man hath no lasting abode in this dust-heap, being even as a bird of meadow and plain [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه موقنه انسان را در این خاکدان بقاای نه چه که مرغ چمنستان و مرغزار
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @martyrs and martyrdom
